faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Simple answers to help you understand when guidance is useful and what information helps during the first contact.

items.a: Bioghaia works with landowners, rural producers, companies, construction projects, developments, and people who need to understand, regularize, or plan an area with greater safety. You can start the conversation even if you are not sure which service you need yet.

items.q: When do I need environmental permitting?
items.a: Environmental permitting may be required for construction, productive activities, intervention in natural areas, land use, business expansion, or area regularization. An initial technical review helps identify whether your case requires a permit, authorization, technical study, or another procedure.

items.q: Do you work with rural areas and agriculture?
items.a: Yes. Bioghaia provides technical support for rural properties, crops, reforestation, land management, terrain analysis, and field problem identification. The goal is to reduce risk, organize information, and support safer decisions before investing or moving forward.

items.q: Does Bioghaia use drones and technology?
items.a: Yes. When the project requires greater precision, Bioghaia can use drones, sensors, aerial imagery, geospatial analysis, and territorial analysis to map areas, identify constraints, observe land characteristics, and generate more reliable technical information.

items.q: Do you serve littoral, mountain, and rural areas?
items.a: Yes. Bioghaia serves littoral, mountain, rural, urban, and expansion areas in Rio Grande do Sul. Each location may have different environmental characteristics and requirements, so a technical reading of the area is an important step.

items.q: I am not sure what I need. Can I still get in touch?
items.a: Yes. The initial conversation is designed to organize your situation, understand the type of project, identify the location, and suggest the most appropriate next step. You do not need to know technical terms or which permit to request.

items.q: How do I request a quote?
items.a: Send a WhatsApp message with the project location, a short description of what you intend to do, and, if possible, photos, documents, or information about the area. With these details, the initial guidance becomes clearer and the quote can be directed more accurately.

whatsAppCta.title: Tell us what you need and receive initial technical guidance.
whatsAppCta.subtitle: Bioghaia helps you understand the situation, organize the first details, and identify the safest next step before the issue becomes a delay, extra cost, or unnecessary risk.

whatsAppCta.miniCardText: Type of request, location, technical urgency, and whether documents, regularization, field analysis, or specialized support may be needed.

ui.privacyIntro: Bioghaia handles shared information responsibly and uses submitted details only to understand your request, provide initial guidance, and continue the service conversation when necessary.
ui.privacyNote: Information sent through WhatsApp, forms, or the digital assistant may include your name, contact details, project location, technical request, photos, documents, or site details. This information is used only for initial analysis, client communication, and delivery of the requested services.

privacy.title: Privacy information
privacy.intro: Bioghaia handles shared information responsibly and uses submitted details only to understand your request, provide initial guidance, and continue the service conversation when necessary.
privacy.note: Information sent through WhatsApp, forms, or the digital assistant may include your name, contact details, project location, technical request, photos, documents, or site details. This information is used only for initial analysis, client communication, and delivery of the requested services.
items: We do not sell personal data.
We do not use your information for third-party advertising.
We only request information needed to understand the project.
Documents, images, and technical data are handled for professional purposes.
You can request clarification about your data at any time through Bioghaia’s contact channel.
